overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG (Hogwarts Legacy) depicting a character walking through a dimly lit gothic great hall with dark wood paneling. The character exits left, revealing students in robes seated at long wooden tables while the camera continues moving slowly through the atmospheric hall with natural light filtering through tall arched windows.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of a character in dark robes walking through a grand gothic hall with dark wood paneling. The character exits left, revealing students seated at long wooden tables. Natural light filters through tall gothic windows, illuminating the stone floor and ornate chandeliers hanging from the ceiling.

segments.scene_description: The camera continues its slow forward movement through the great hall, passing rows of wooden dining tables where students in robes sit studying. The large stone archway at the far end gradually approaches as the camera moves deeper into the hall, with dark wood paneling lining both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit gothic hall that gradually opens up to reveal a bustling student dining area. It begins with a character in dark robes walking past dark wood paneling before they exit to the left, uncovering rows of students seated at long wooden tables. As the camera glides forward, natural light filters through tall gothic windows to illuminate the stone floor and ornate chandeliers hanging from the ceiling. The scene then expands as the camera passes more studying students, moving deeper into the hall while the dark wood paneling continues to line the periphery. This steady progression finally leads the viewer toward a large stone archway that looms at the far end of the great hall.
